name: MIMIC Replay
description: Open-source, self-hosted session replay framework built on rrweb with custom network interceptors for debugging and UX research.

seo.title: MIMIC Replay — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: MIMIC Replay: Open-source, self-hosted session replay framework built on rrweb with custom network interceptors for debugging and UX research.

when_to_use: Self-hosted session replay with full data ownership
Custom network interceptor for API request replay
Open-source session recording for privacy-sensitive apps

pros: Open-source and self-hostable for full data control
Built on rrweb so replay fidelity matches commercial tools
Custom network interceptors help debug API issues
No per-session pricing when you run your own infra
cons: Self-hosting means you own the scaling and retention bill
Minimal product analytics, funnels or dashboards
Smaller community means less plug-and-play tooling
review.verdict: Good privacy-first rrweb framework for engineers who want replay without sending pixels to a SaaS vendor.
review.best_for: Privacy-sensitive teams with engineering capacity to self-host replay.
review.not_for: Marketing or product teams expecting turnkey dashboards and support.
